title: Product Launch Sync

agenda.text: Launch timeline review — are we still on track for March 20?
Marketing assets — blog post, social, Product Hunt

notes:
Alice: We're 10 days from launch. Feature freeze was yesterday. QA has 3 P1 bugs to close.

Bob: Two P1s are mine — WebSocket reconnection (PR in review) and file upload timeout (targeting Wednesday).

Carol: All marketing assets done — landing page, social cards, email templates. Need to update hero screenshot with dark mode.

Eve: Load testing passed — 10K concurrent users, p99 < 200ms. Auto-scaling works. PagerDuty alerts set up.

Dave: Blog post drafted, 12,847 waitlist subscribers ready. Product Hunt scheduled for March 20 at 12:01 AM PST. 3 journalists lined up.

Alice: Dress rehearsal on March 18 — full deploy to staging. Meeting adjourned.

actionItems.text: Fix WebSocket reconnection P1 — merge PR
Investigate and fix file upload timeout P1
Update hero screenshot with dark mode
Send blog post draft to Alice for review
